svg.title: Hand-drawn decode GEMM latency curves
svg.desc: Hand-drawn latency curves for backend comparison across M and N.
svg.text: Kernel Latency Across Decode GEMM Shapes
BF16 GEMM, K=7168, gfx950 / 256 CUs. Lower is better; curves are intentionally kept as detailed backup.
Detailed latency view generated from the measured backend CSV files under blog/data.
